description: Bill of release. Dating: signed on Wednesday, 29 Kislev 1377 Seleucid = 30 November 1065 CE. In which Natan b. Yeshuʿa ha-Kohen gives a bill of divorce to his fiancée Sittān bat Yaḥyā, and she releases him from any claim. The release is given to Yefet who serves as a proxy to take the document to Tyre. Signed by Shemuel b. Yiṣḥaq, Ḥayyim b. ʿAmmār, Faraḥ b. Yosef, […] b. Naʿm, Moshe ha-Levi b. Shela, Elʿazar Ibn ha-Shofeṭ, […] ha-Levi b. Ḥalfon, and Yehuda b. […]. Information from GRU catalog via FGP.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
